supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Fabric customers with tenants located in West US2 region may experience latencies and intermittent issues while interacting with the artifacts in service. .There is an ongoing Azure outage and engineers are investigating the issue, up to date status on the investigation can be found at Azure Service Health for now.
active.detailsText: Fabric customers with tenants located in West US2 region may experience latencies and intermittent issues while interacting with the artifacts in service. .There is an ongoing Azure outage and engineers are investigating the issue, up to date status on the investigation can be found at Azure Service Health for now.

active.detailsHtml: Fabric customers using the Teams mobile app may experience issues loading reports within the app. Engineers are investigating the issue and updates will be provided soon. As a workaround, customers may open the reports in a browser.
active.detailsText: Fabric customers using the Teams mobile app may experience issues loading reports within the app. Engineers are investigating the issue and updates will be provided soon. As a workaround, customers may open the reports in a browser.
